summary: Minimal edit to reduce a near-verbatim streetlight-description echo between Ch 11's closing paragraph and Ch 12 line 259. Both used 'adjusting their brightness' and 'AI-managed' for the same automated-streetlight detail; Ch 12's instance was reworded to use distinct vocabulary ('dimming/recovering', 'automated municipal tracking', 'evening grid') while preserving the same world-building information. All other seams are clean: the entry references Ch 11's couch scene explicitly at line 103, the exit sets up Ch 13's three-day-gap recap accurately, opening structures are distinct across adjacent chapters, and no style-bible example_lines appear verbatim.
edits: Line 259: Reworded streetlight description to avoid echoing Ch 11's closing image — replaced 'adjusting their brightness' and 'AI-managed city' with 'dimming/recovering' and 'automated municipal tracking through the evening grid'
